title: QuorumKit Agent Message (apm-msg)
description: Single machine-readable message emitted by an agent at the end of a step (FR-011, FR-012).

version.description: apm-msg schema version. v2 is the only supported value.

runId.description: Pipeline run UUID; must equal the active run.

step.description: Step name as declared in the pipeline.

agent.description: Agent slug (e.g. 'qa-agent', 'dev-agent') matching the agent identity registry.

iteration.description: 1-based iteration counter for the step on the current edge.

outcome.description: Declared outcome enum. Source of truth: docs/AGENT_PROTOCOL.md.

payload.description: Optional per-outcome payload. Schema is per-outcome; see regulation document.
